maml:description.maml:para: Displays the DICOM tags from a DICOM file.
The literal path to a DICOM file.
The path of the DICOM file(s). Can include wildcards or regular expressions to specify multiple files.
The literal path to a DICOM file.
The path of the DICOM file(s). Can include wildcards or regular expressions to specify multiple files.
Sends a DICOM C-Echo to a DICOM endpoint.
Sends a DICOM C-Echo to a DICOM endpoint. Return the response, and time taken to respond (If successful).
Hostname or IP Address of DICOM service
The local (calling) AE Title
The port number of the remote DICOM interface.
The remote (called) AE Title
The timeout in seconds to wait for DICOM association, or a response from the DICOM service once a request has been submitted.
Negiotiate a TLS secured connection (the remote DICOM interface must support TLS secured connections).
Hostname or IP Address of DICOM service
The local (calling) AE Title
The port number of the remote DICOM interface.
The remote (called) AE Title
The timeout in seconds to wait for DICOM association, or a response from the DICOM service once a request has been submitted.
Negiotiate a TLS secured connection (the remote DICOM interface must support TLS secured connections).

maml:introduction.maml:para: Hostname Port ResponseTime Status -------- ---- ------------ ------ www.dicomserver.co.uk 11112 1587 ms Success

maml:description.maml:para: Send a C-FIND query to a DICOM interface, display the results returned.
Send a C-FIND query to a DICOM interface, display the results returned. Default values for LocalAETitle and RemoteAETitle used if not supplied via the parameters.

Search by values provided in either PatientName, PatientID, StudyID, or AccessionNumber parameters. Include * search string for wildcard searches. Warning: A single search value of * will return all studies.
Constrain the search for studies acquired on or before this date. Accepts any string that can be parsed as a date.
Hostname or IP Address of DICOM service
The local (calling) AE Title
Constrain the search to a modality type.
The name of the patient to search for. Can include '*' for wildcard searches.
The port number of the remote DICOM interface.
The remote (called) AE Title
Constrain the search for studies acquired on or after this date. Accepts any string that can be parsed as a date.
The timeout in seconds to wait for DICOM association, or a response from the DICOM service once a request has been submitted.
Negiotiate a TLS secured connection (the remote DICOM interface must support TLS secured connections).
Constrain the search for studies acquired on or before this date. Accepts any string that can be parsed as a date.
Hostname or IP Address of DICOM service
The local (calling) AE Title
Constrain the search to a modality type.
The patient ID to search for. Can include '*' for wildcard searches.
The port number of the remote DICOM interface.
The remote (called) AE Title
Constrain the search for studies acquired on or after this date. Accepts any string that can be parsed as a date.
The timeout in seconds to wait for DICOM association, or a response from the DICOM service once a request has been submitted.
Negiotiate a TLS secured connection (the remote DICOM interface must support TLS secured connections).
Constrain the search for studies acquired on or before this date. Accepts any string that can be parsed as a date.
Hostname or IP Address of DICOM service
The local (calling) AE Title
Constrain the search to a modality type.
The port number of the remote DICOM interface.
The remote (called) AE Title
Constrain the search for studies acquired on or after this date. Accepts any string that can be parsed as a date.
The study instance ID to search for. Can include '*' for wildcard searches.
The timeout in seconds to wait for DICOM association, or a response from the DICOM service once a request has been submitted.
Negiotiate a TLS secured connection (the remote DICOM interface must support TLS secured connections).
The Accession number to search for. Can include '*' for wildcard searches.
Constrain the search for studies acquired on or before this date. Accepts any string that can be parsed as a date.
Hostname or IP Address of DICOM service
The local (calling) AE Title
Constrain the search to a modality type.
The port number of the remote DICOM interface.
The remote (called) AE Title
Constrain the search for studies acquired on or after this date. Accepts any string that can be parsed as a date.
The timeout in seconds to wait for DICOM association, or a response from the DICOM service once a request has been submitted.
Negiotiate a TLS secured connection (the remote DICOM interface must support TLS secured connections).
The Accession number to search for. Can include '*' for wildcard searches.
Constrain the search for studies acquired on or before this date. Accepts any string that can be parsed as a date.
Hostname or IP Address of DICOM service
The local (calling) AE Title
Constrain the search to a modality type.
The patient ID to search for. Can include '*' for wildcard searches.
The name of the patient to search for. Can include '*' for wildcard searches.
The port number of the remote DICOM interface.
The remote (called) AE Title
Constrain the search for studies acquired on or after this date. Accepts any string that can be parsed as a date.
The study instance ID to search for. Can include '*' for wildcard searches.
The timeout in seconds to wait for DICOM association, or a response from the DICOM service once a request has been submitted.
Negiotiate a TLS secured connection (the remote DICOM interface must support TLS secured connections).

maml:introduction.maml:para: Find all patients where Patient Name is 'Test'
Find all patients with Patient ID starting with '123'
Find all CT scans acquired from 1 Jan 2020 through to 31 Dec 2020
Find patient details for Study Instance ID of '1.2.826.0.1.3680043.2.891.113.20210702141058064482710'

maml:description.maml:para: Send a DICOM C-GET to retrieve images from a remote host.
Hostname or IP Address of DICOM service
The client calling AE title
The output directory to save retrieved DICOM files
Port number of remote DICOM service
The server called AE title
The Study Instance UID to retrieve
The timeout in seconds to wait for a response
Use TLS to secure the connection

The client calling AE title
The output directory to save retrieved DICOM files
Port number of remote DICOM service
The server called AE title
The Series Instance UID to retrieve
The timeout in seconds to wait for a response
Use TLS to secure the connection

The server called AE title
The SOP Instance UID to retrieve
The timeout in seconds to wait for a response
Use TLS to secure the connection

The server called AE title

The SOP Instance UID to retrieve
The Study Instance UID to retrieve
The timeout in seconds to wait for a response
Use TLS to secure the connection
Send a DICOM C-MOVE to instruct a remote host to send images to a specified move destination AE title.
Send a DICOM C-MOVE to instruct a remote host to send images to a specified move destination AE title.
Hostname or IP Address of DICOM service
The client calling AE title
The AE title of the destination to send images to
Port number of remote DICOM service
The server called AE title
The Study Instance UID to retrieve
The timeout in seconds to wait for a response
Use TLS to secure the connection

The AE title of the destination to send images to

Query a DICOM Modality Work List (DMWL), display the results returned.

Query a DICOM Modality Work List (DMWL), display the results returned. Default values for LocalAETitle and RemoteAETitle used if not supplied via the parameters. The default results will contain Patient details, to access scheduled procedure steps expand the 'ProcedureSteps' property returned.
Restrict search by PatientName, PatientID, or Modality parameters. Include * search string for wildcard searches. Warning: A single search value of * will return all studies.

The StartDateTime and EndDateTime parameters can be supplied to constrain the search to exams scheduled between these dates. Both parameters must be supplied to create a date range. Any text value can be entered providing it can be recognised as a Date or DateTime value. e.g. "1997-09-18 20:00" or "18 Sept 97 8pm" would be accepted.
Include studies from or after this date YYYYMMDD
Hostname or IP Address of DICOM service
The client calling AE title
Constrain results to specific modalities
Include studies scheduled for this Patient ID
Include studies scheduled for this Patient name
Port number of remote DICOM service
The server called AE title
Include studies scheduled from or after this date (and time)
The timeout in seconds to wait for a response
Use TLS to secure the connection
Include studies from or after this date YYYYMMDD
Hostname or IP Address of DICOM service
The client calling AE title
Constrain results to specific modalities
Include studies scheduled for this Patient ID
Include studies scheduled for this Patient name
Port number of remote DICOM service
The server called AE title
Include studies scheduled from or after this date (and time)
The timeout in seconds to wait for a response
Use TLS to secure the connection

maml:introduction.maml:para: Query DICOM modality worklist, display the procedure steps for the 3rd result returned:
StepID : 1 Modality : MR PerformingPhysician : Evans^^^Dr StepDateTime : 1/01/2001 12:30:00 PM StepDescription : MRI Left Shoulder
Query patients with a scheduled CT exam between 4pm and 8pm on 18 September 1997:
